reasoning: The Sovereign Base Areas of Akrotiri and Dhekelia have a very small population composed mainly of UK military personnel, their dependents, and some local Cypriot residents. Political violence and riots are extremely rare in this territory. While protests occur occasionally regarding the military use of the bases, these are overwhelmingly peaceful and classified by ACLED as "Protests" rather than "Riots". The provided data indicates zero riots over the 360 days preceding October 2025. Given the heavy policing of the military installations, the absence of any recent trend of violent mobilization, and the strict ACLED requirement for a "Riot" to involve destructive acts or physical violence, the probability of at least one riot occurring in the 30-day window ending on January 24, 2026, is negligible. I estimate this at the lowest permissible floor of 2%.
